---
title: "Zapada viscolita"
subtitle: "Nichita Stănescu"
author: "Doctor Shrink"
date: "2026-06-23"
categories: [poezie, spoken-word, iarna]
image: "../images/tds-logo-150px.png"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

## ▶️ Ascultă

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/bS2unaQBjFE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## 📜 Versuri {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics}
MI-ai viscolit gindirea<br>
<br>
tu tandra Dora mea<br>
<br>
ca o zapada de demult<br>
<br>
intind spre tine o zapada si o nea<br>
<br>
de nimeni nu ascult<br>
<br>
ma viscolise-n mine<br>
<br>
chiar singele cel alb<br>
<br>
care ninsese mama<br>
<br>
ca sa ma faca slav<br>
<br>
Ma viscolise piatra<br>
<br>
cu greaua ei tacere<br>
<br>
ma viscolise clipa<br>
<br>
aceea, care piere<br>
<br>
Dra mi-am dat foc la radacini<br>
<br>
si frunze am de aur<br>
<br>
jumatate cal, in rest senin<br>
<br>
vedeti-ma centaur<br>
<br>
cu trunchi de om<br>
<br>
cu trup de cal<br>
<br>
la sarbatoarea voastra<br>
<br>
cind faceti in metal<br>
<br>
pe pasarea albastra.
:::

## 🖋️ Despre {.unnumbered}

* **Poet:** Nichita Stănescu
* **Temă:** iarna
* **Interpretare:** Doctor Shrink — recitare spoken-word, fundal ambiental
